title: Golden Ride – Cinematic Vintage Scooter Journey with Playful Wildlife Companions
fullPrompt:
Jltra realistic cinematic photo of the person from the reference
image riding a vintage blue scooter through a lively, sunlit
street filled with motion blur and vibrant colors. He wears a
bright patterned shirt and has a joyful, expressive face,
radiating humor and energy
On his shoulders and arms are small, realistic baby animals
a playful tiger cub, a lion cub, and a curious chimpanzee - all
captured mid-motion as the scooter speeds through the
scene. The atmosphere is dynamic and full of life: birds flying, dust

movie still - perfectly timed, with motion blur on the
background but crisp focus on the subject and animals
Camera angle: wide shot, low and frontal, emphasizing speed
and expression.
Lighting: golden hour cinematic light, HDR reflections on metal,
glowing highlights.

title: River Sentinel – Cinematic Bow-of-Boat Eagle Feeding Portrait
fullPrompt: A cinematic, hyper-realistic high-angle vertical shot of a young man ( use reference image ) standing at the bow of a wooden boat floating in the middle of a river. He gazes upward with one arm raised, feeding a piece of meat to a soaring eagle just above his head. The eagle’s intense eyes and outstretched wings are partially captured in the frame. ( 2/1 )The man is dressed in a checkered shirt with rolled-up sleeves over a white T-shirt, track pants, and a running shoes, accessorized with a leather-strap wristwatch. His slightly tousled curly hair blows in the wind. Both the man and the eagle are in sharp focus, while the background ripples of the river remain softly blurred. Natural lighting and a bird’s-eye cinematic perspective enhance the scene’s dramatic and poetic tone.
